title: Marsdenia australis
taxonomy: Marsdenia australis is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This family is commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. Within the Apocynaceae family, Marsdenia australis is further classified in the subfamily Asclepiadoideae. The subfamily Asclepiadoideae is known for its unique flowers that have a distinctive shape and structure. Marsdenia australis is native to Australia, where it grows in a variety of habitats.
